name: AF risk increase for CIED patients
description: One in three cardiovascular implantable electronic device (CIED) patients will develop new onset atrial fibrillation (AF) within the first 2.5 years post-implant. This metric highlights the prevalence of AF in CIED patients, with the boundary that it applies specifically to the first 2.5 years after device implantation and is limited to new onset AF.
